content: Order of service for the Greater Hope Baptist Church 75th Anniversary on December 12: 1) Processional and Call to Worship; 2) Opening Hymn; 3) Scripture Reading and Invocation; 4) Anniversary Choir Selection; 5) Offering and Commemorative Book Presentation; 6) Guest Sermon; 7) Closing Hymn and Benediction. Guest preacher: Bishop L.D. Holloway.
excerpt: The order of service for our 75th anniversary celebration on December 12.
title: Greater Hope Baptist 75th Anniversary — Order of Service (December 12)
